summary: Iteration 2: regression + targeted verification of BUG FIX 1 (frentista sidebar & redirect) and BUG FIX 2 (AI fraud detection removed). Backend: 42/42 tests passed (37 pre-existing + 5 new in test_ai_removed.py). Frontend: full flow validated with Playwright — frentista redirected to /refuel, sidebar shows only nav-refuel, direct URL access to /vehicles and /alerts shows forbidden page; admin/gestor/auditor unaffected. AI removal confirmed: no new ia_gerado=true alerts are created after refuel; heuristic rules 'aumento_repentino_consumo' and 'abastecimentos_frequentes' still trigger correctly.

minor.issue: 9 legacy alerts with ia_gerado=true and tipo='ia_deteccao_fraude' remain in DB from before the AI removal fix. Not blocking (no new ones are being created), but frontend Alerts screen still shows them. Consider a one-time cleanup migration or a filter to hide legacy IA alerts.

action_items: OPTIONAL: cleanup or hide the 9 legacy IA alerts (tipo='ia_deteccao_fraude' / ia_gerado=true) so the Alerts screen isn't polluted by pre-fix data. E.g. one-off script: db.alerts.deleteMany({tipo:'ia_deteccao_fraude'}) or a UI filter.
OPTIONAL: remove now-unused function analyze_refuel_with_ai from /app/backend/fraud_ai.py (still defined but never imported) to reduce dead code.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py no longer imports analyze_refuel_with_ai — good, AI removal is effective at the call site (line 56 & 703).
fraud_ai.py still defines analyze_refuel_with_ai (dead code). Recommend deleting for cleanliness.
Layout.jsx cleanly hides items via `hideFor: ['frentista']`; NAV visibility filter (line 46-49) works correctly.
App.js HomeRoute cleanly redirects frentista to /refuel (line 25).
ProtectedRoute correctly renders forbidden page for role mismatch (data-testid='forbidden').
Alerts stored with ia_gerado defaulting to False in heuristic path — GOOD.
test_credentials: admin@frotanfc.gov.br/admin123, gestor@frotanfc.gov.br/senha123, frentista@frotanfc.gov.br/senha123, auditor@frotanfc.gov.br/senha123 — all working
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_-prefixed vehicles (AI*/HR*/FQ*) with cleanup via DELETE. Some may remain due to best-effort cleanup on failure.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG FIX 1 (frontend RBAC frentista): fully validated via Playwright — frentista sidebar shows only nav-refuel, forbidden page displayed on direct URL to /vehicles /alerts /drivers etc., HomeRoute redirects / to /refuel. BUG FIX 2 (AI removal): validated via new test file /app/backend/tests/test_ai_removed.py — no new ia_gerado=true alerts after refuel, heuristics 'aumento_repentino_consumo' and 'abastecimentos_frequentes' still trigger. Legacy IA alerts remain in DB (9 items, all >5min old); reported as minor cleanup item. Backend regression suite (37 tests) still green.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — both fixes verified working. The only residual issue is DB-level: pre-fix ia_gerado=true alerts persist; a one-time cleanup query would resolve.
